title: Ep 19: Tome CEO Keith Peiris on Disrupting Powerpoint and Scaling To Millions of Users
full_text: Jacob and Pat sit down with Tome Co-Founder and CEO Keith Peiris to discuss Tome’s go-to market strategy, deciphering through the “AI tourists” to identify their ideal customer profile (ICP), and the different hardware cost considerations when reaching enterprise scale. 0:00 intro1:35 founding Tome5:05 designing Tome10:30 how users want to interact with AI12:26 teaching users how to use Tome20:13 partnering with model providers vs. building your own28:43 model evaluation31:23 building an enterpr
